div.style: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #8a9ab0; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase;

td.style: border: none; padding: 13px 10px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;
border: none; padding: 13px 10px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;
border: none; padding: 13px 10px; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;
border: none; padding: 13px 10px; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle;
